def suitable_for_crocheting(self, criteria: List[str]) -> bool:
        gender_criteria = criteria[0]
        age_criteria = int(criteria[1])
        employment_status_criteria = criteria[2]
        education_criteria = criteria[3]
        marital_status_criteria = criteria[4]
        religion_criteria = criteria[5]
        hand_eye_coordination_criteria = criteria[6]

        if (self.gender in gender_criteria) and (self.age in age_criteria) and (self.employment_status == employment_status_criteria) and (self.education in education_criteria) and (self.marital_status in marital_status_criteria) and (self.religion in religion_criteria) and (self.hand_eye_coordination == hand_eye_coordination_criteria):
            return True
        else:
            return False
